name: docs
description: Use when the user wants the right document-creation skill — tutorials, how-tos, references, explanations, or ADRs.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

# Docs Router

Index of document-creation skills. Invoke the right skill by name.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `documentation-writer` | Software documentation using the Diátaxis framework, including architectural decision records (ADR). |
| `internal-writing` | Meeting minutes, performance/peer/upward reviews, brag sheets, weekly updates, newsletters, FAQ answers, or other internal communications. |
| `ml-paper-writing` | Publication-ready ML/AI papers (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, ACL, AAAI, COLM). |
| `domain-modeling` | Build and sharpen a project's domain model / ubiquitous language. |
| `graphify` | Map, document, onboard into, or query a codebase as a knowledge graph. |
